name: ui-asset-studio
description: Faithful offline UI asset processing and Sketch-safe SVG workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Faithful UI asset processing and SVG repair.
interface.longDescription: Process UI assets faithfully: true-alpha cutouts, safe SVG and Sketch checks, scale exports, icon reviews, and Image-2 prompt shaping.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $ui-asset-studio to process this UI asset without redesigning it.
